name: Witch

recommended.why: Knight Gear increases Attack, HP and Skill Damage, allowing Witch to provide stronger healing while improving the effectiveness of her Dread Golem and overall battlefield support.

alternative.why: A strong alternative when Knight Gear is unavailable. The additional HP and Damage Reduction improve Witch's survivability, allowing her to keep supporting the team during longer battles.

investment.why: Witch is one of the strongest support heroes in Top Heroes and the core healer for Horde teams. Her healing, damage reduction and Dread Golem provide exceptional value from mid game through the end game, making her one of the highest priority Mythic investments.

description: Witch is a Mythic Horde healer who excels at keeping her team alive through powerful healing, defensive support and battlefield control. Her Dread Golem disrupts enemies while her sustained healing keeps frontline heroes alive, making her a cornerstone of nearly every competitive Horde lineup.
